title: Tangy Velvety Egyptian Toor Dal Stir-fry
description: A crowd-pleasing paleo-friendly dish featuring tangy-toasted toor dal with a delectable glaze for added depth and texture.

ingredients.name: 1 cup soaked and drained toor dal

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onions and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Stir in toor dal, cumin, turmeric powder, lemon juice, honey or agave nectar, and salt. Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Deglaze the skillet with a splash of water, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom. Reduce heat to low and simmer until liquid is almost evaporated.
Stir in red bell pepper slices and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until soft and slightly tender.
Serve hot as a side dish or over cauliflower rice (optional). Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
